name: BAYERN MUNICH 25-26 AWAY (FV)
description: Bayern Munich’s 2025/26 away kit, designed by adidas, was officially unveiled in May 2025 as a tribute to the 20th anniversary of the Allianz Arena. The jersey features a clean white base accented with subtle grey and coral details, incorporating a distinctive camouflage-like pattern inspired by the stadium’s iconic façade. This modern design blends heritage and innovation, celebrating two decades of the club’s history at their home ground. The kit debuted on May 10, 2025, during Bayern’s final Bundesliga home match of the season against Borussia Mönchengladbach—fittingly, the same team they faced in their first league match at the Allianz Arena in 2005. The occasion was also marked by a farewell appearance from club legend Thomas Müller, who wore a special edition of the new away kit. The jersey is now available for purchase in men’s, women’s, and children’s sizes through FC Bayern’s official online store.

What sets this kit apart is the reintroduction of the iconic Diavoletto logo—a stylized red devil formed from three flames—that was originally used between 1979 and 1982. This nostalgic emblem replaces the usual club crest, marking a rare and historic return. The shirt also includes a subtle topographic pattern woven into the fabric, adding depth and modern flair. Officially slated for release in July or August 2025, the kit will be available through the AC Milan online store and Puma outlets. Its blend of heritage and contemporary design is expected to make it a favorite among fans and collectors alike.
